articles.title: Nintendo Fixes Backwards Compatibility for Switch 2
articles.description: Nintendo has released new backwards compatibility fixes for Switch games on the Switch 2. Check out the full list of updates for May 2026.
articles.impact: Enhances user experience for Switch 2 owners.

articles.title: GitHub Copilot's New Billing Model Sparks Outrage
articles.description: GitHub Copilot's shift to token-based billing has upset many developers. The change marks a significant departure from its previous subscription model.
articles.impact: May drive users away from GitHub Copilot.

articles.title: Gemini Rapidly Closing Gap with ChatGPT
articles.description: Gemini is quickly narrowing the gap with ChatGPT due to several key advancements. Despite ChatGPT's popularity, Gemini's improvements are noteworthy.
articles.impact: Increases competition in the AI landscape.

articles.title: ChatGPT's Controversial State Rankings Revealed
articles.description: A new study reveals ChatGPT's controversial rankings of states based on intelligence and attractiveness. The findings have sparked discussions about AI biases.
articles.impact: Raises concerns about AI fairness and accuracy.

articles.title: Fitbit Air vs. Oura Ring: Which is Better?
articles.description: A comparison of the Fitbit Air and Oura Ring reveals strengths and weaknesses of both fitness trackers. The choice depends on user preferences for wrist or finger wear.
articles.impact: Helps consumers choose the right tracker.

articles.title: MacBook Pro Hits Lowest Price on Amazon
articles.description: The 2025 MacBook Pro is now available at its lowest price on Amazon. This deal offers powerful performance in a portable package.
articles.impact: Encourages buyers to consider the MacBook Pro.
